zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume De Vergy I於1180年出生在法國布格o-達雷勒-維吉時，他的父親Hugues de Vergy39歲，母親Gillette de Trainel26歲。他於1203年與Clémence de Fouvent在法國布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年1月18日享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume De Vergy I于1180年出生在法国布格o-達雷勒-維吉时，他的父亲Hugues de Vergy39岁，母亲Gillette de Trainel26岁。他于1203年与Clémence de Fouvent在法国布格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年1月18日享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Herefordshire): nickname from Middle English verrei, verie ‘true; reliable, trustworthy’ (Old French verai).

Irish: variant of McVerry, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fearadhaigh, itself an unlenited and subsequently voiced variant of Mac Fhearadhaigh, ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’. Compare McAree and McCary ; also the surnames Ferry and Farry , from Ó Fearadhaigh.
History: The widow Bridget Very settled with her children in Salem, MA, c. 1634. She had many prominent descendants, including the poet Jones Very (1813–1880).

variants.name: McAree
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhearadhaigh ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’ (from fear ‘man’). Pronunciation of this name as McAree led to misinterpretation as Mac an Rí ‘son of the king’ and thus to ‘translation’ as King . See McGarry .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume De Vergy I was born in 1180, in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Hugues de Vergy, was 39 and his mother, Gillette de Trainel, was 26. He married Clémence de Fouvent in 1203, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 January 1240, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume De Vergy I est né en 1180, à Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues de Vergy, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Gillette de Trainel, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Clémence de Fouvent en 1203, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1240, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume De Vergy I 1180 in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Vergy 39 und seine Mutter Gillette de Trainel 26. Er hat 1203 in Burgund, Frankreich Clémence de Fouvent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1240 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume De Vergy I è nato il nel 1180 nel Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Vergy, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Gillette de Trainel, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Clémence de Fouvent nel 1203, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1240, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume De Vergy Iが1180年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルレウレ-バーグイで生まれた時，父Hugues de Vergyは39歳，母Gillette de Trainelは26歳であった。1203年にフランスボウルゴグンでClémence de Fouventと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年1月18日に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume De Vergy I(이)가 1180년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 레우레-버기에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Vergy(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Gillette de Trainel(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1203년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Clémence de Fouvent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 1월 18일 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume De Vergy I nasceu em 1180, em Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues de Vergy, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Gillette de Trainel, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence de Fouvent em 1203, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1240, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume De Vergy I родился в 1180 г. в местности реулле-вирги, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Vergy было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Gillette de Trainel, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence de Fouvent в 1203 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 января 1240 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume De Vergy I nació en 1180, en Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Vergy, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Gillette de Trainel, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Clémence de Fouvent en 1203, en Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1240, a la edad de 60 años.
